column1: # Limited providers fixtures manifest (DeepSeek, MiniMax, Xiaomi MiMo).
# Lines starting with "#" are ignored. The shim consumes the Nth
# non-comment line on the Nth invocation; on URL mismatch it FAIL HARD
# No real credentials, no live endpoints. All tokens and URLs are
# anonymised. Counts are pre-seeded via printf "N\n" to AIQUOTAS_HTTP_STATE/counter.
# Xiaomi MiMo: configured URL + schema returns valid configured records
# Xiaomi MiMo: malformed body (response has no canonical fields)
